description: Builds a tiny bundled C++ smoke project with the CubeIDE arm-none-eabi toolchain, forces the freshly built patched linker through -B, and validates the canonical top-level JSON contract.

checks.description: The self-contained verify smoke script runs successfully

notes: This verify recipe is self-contained inside ld_patcher and does not depend on external STM32 example projects.
If arm-none-eabi-g++.exe is not on PATH, it can be auto-detected from STM32CubeIDE or from standard C:\ST installs.
